mapper.select: SELECT id, symbol, cik, taxonomy, concept, unit, fiscal_year, fiscal_period, form, filed_at, start_date, end_date, accession_number, frame, value, raw_json, fetched_at FROM stock_sec_fact WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY filed_at, end_date, concept
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_sec_fact ( symbol, cik, taxonomy, concept, unit, fiscal_year, fiscal_period, form, filed_at, start_date, end_date, accession_number, frame, value, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES
( #{fact.symbol}, #{fact.cik}, #{fact.taxonomy}, #{fact.concept}, #{fact.unit}, #{fact.fiscalYear}, #{fact.fiscalPeriod}, #{fact.form}, #{fact.filedAt}, #{fact.startDate}, #{fact.endDate}, #{fact.accessionNumber}, #{fact.frame}, #{fact.value}, #{fact.rawJson}, #{fact.fetchedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE form = VALUES(form), filed_at = VALUES(filed_at), start_date = VALUES(start_date), frame = VALUES(frame), value = VALUES(value), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
